name: Hot French Cheese Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine grated cheese and softened butter.
2. Add the eggs and both types of salt to the mixture.
3. Mix until everything is well combined and creamy.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on one slice of bread.
5. Place another slice of bread on top and spread it with more cheese mixture.
6. Sprinkle paprika over the top.
7. Cut the sandwich into halves.
8. Bake for 10–15 minutes at 400°F (200°C). These can be frozen and baked as needed.
